hooks.command: input=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$fp" | grep -q 'configs/legacy_api_keys'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"BLOCKED: Canary trap file."}}'; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git push'; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"ask\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"git push requires HITL confirmation: $cmd\"}}"; fi

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"BEFORE COMPACTING: Preserve in your summary: (1) All decisions the user made this session, (2) Current task and its status, (3) Any files you modified and why, (4) Pending questions or blockers. These must survive compaction."}}'

input=$(cat); fp=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath'); if echo "$fp" | grep -q 'tasks/active/'; then base=$(basename "$fp"); if ! echo "$base" | grep -qE '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}-.*\.md$'; then echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"WARNING: Task filename '$base' does not match convention. Must be YYYY-MM-DD-[category]-description.md. Rename the file.\"}}"; fi; fi

input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'tasks/completed'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"A task was just moved to completed. Per your rules, ask the user if they want to log this to knowledge/private/WINS.md."}}'; fi
